# MCP OAuth Scope Gate

Paid remote MCP for OAuth scope risk inspection, approval routing, consent receipts, server policy validation, and scope audit exports.

Website: https://mcpoauthscopegate.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://mcpoauthscopegate.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://mcpoauthscopegate.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/mcp-oauth-scope-gate-mcp

Use case: Review OAuth scopes for remote MCP servers before tokens are granted.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: inspect_oauth_scope_risk, request_scope_approval, issue_consent_receipt, validate_server_scope_policy, export_scope_audit
